name: Paint
description: The classic Microsoft app, reimagined as an Archipelago game!

options.label: Progression Balancing
options.description: A system that can move progression earlier, to try and prevent the player from getting stuck and bored early.

options.label: Accessibility
options.description: Set rules for reachability of your items/locations.

options.label: Logic Percent
options.description: Sets the maximum percent similarity required for a check to be in logic.

options.label: Goal Percent
options.description: Sets the percent similarity required to achieve your goal.

options.label: Half Percent Checks
options.description: Sets the lowest percent at which locations will be created for each 0.5% of similarity.

options.label: Quarter Percent Checks
options.description: Sets the lowest percent at which locations will be created for each 0.25% of similarity.

options.label: Canvas Size Increment
options.description: Sets the number of pixels the canvas will expand for each width/height item received.

options.label: Starting Tool
options.description: Sets which tool (other than Magnifier) you will be able to use from the start.

options.label: Trap Count
options.description: Sets the percentage of filler items to be replaced by random traps.

options.label: Death Link
options.description: If on, using the Undo or Clear Image functions will send a death to all other players with death link on.
